name: exponential
description: Connect Codex to Exponential workspaces through MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Manage Exponential issues and imports from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Use Codex with Exponential workspaces through a remote MCP connection. Create and update issues, projects, labels, statuses, views, and workspace settings, or migrate work from another MCP-connected platform into Exponential with a guided import workflow.
defaultPrompt: Create a project plan in Exponential.
